name: Workflow Run Started
description: Fired when a markdown workflow run begins via the `run` CLI command. Properties: workflow_id, run_id, has_llm_provider.

name: Workflow Run Completed
description: Fired when a markdown workflow run finishes with status completed, failed, or awaiting_review. Properties: workflow_id, run_id, status, step_count.

name: Agent Workflow Started
description: Fired when an agent-bound workflow run begins via the `run-agent` CLI command. Properties: agent_id, run_id, workflow_id.

name: Agent Workflow Completed
description: Fired when an agent-bound workflow finishes. Properties: agent_id, run_id, status, step_count.

name: DAG Workflow Started
description: Fired when a declarative DAG workflow begins via the `run-dag` CLI command. Properties: workflow_id, run_id, node_count, auto_approve_gates.

name: DAG Workflow Completed
description: Fired when a declarative DAG workflow finishes. Properties: workflow_id, run_id, status, completed_stage_count.

name: Human Gate Decided
description: Fired when a human gate in a DAG workflow is resumed with an approval or rejection decision. Properties: run_id, node_id, decision (approved/rejected).
